metadata.title: 3 Signs Someone Secretly Hates You (Dark Psychology)
metadata.tags: FakeFriends, Jealousy, DarkPsychology, RobertGreene, Sigma, Truth, shorts

script_segments.text: They smile to your face, but they are holding a knife behind your back.
script_segments.visual_keywords: venomous snake moving in dark grass, person hiding knife behind back, cinematic lighting, deceptive smile mask

script_segments.text: Here are three signs someone is secretly jealous of you.
script_segments.visual_keywords: person clapping in slow motion with angry eyes, dark room, shadowy figure watching from distance

script_segments.text: Number one: The Micro-Frown. When you announce good news, watch their face instantly.
script_segments.visual_keywords: extreme close up of eyes narrowing, cinematic conversation shot, nervous facial twitch

script_segments.text: If their mouth frowns for a split second before they smile... they hate your success.
script_segments.visual_keywords: mouth frowning then smiling quickly, slow motion facial expression analysis, glitch effect on face

script_segments.text: Number two: The 'Luck' Comment. They attribute your hard work to luck.
script_segments.visual_keywords: rolling dice in slow motion, lottery ticket falling, golden coins spinning, gambling aesthetic

script_segments.text: By saying 'you got lucky,' they try to lower your value to protect their own ego.
script_segments.visual_keywords: fragile glass statue cracking, person looking envious, silhouette of small man vs giant shadow

script_segments.text: Number three: The Mimic. They copy your style, your words, and your moves.
script_segments.visual_keywords: mirror reflection, two people dressed identically, parrot repeating, doppleganger effect

script_segments.text: They want to be you, but they want you dead.
script_segments.visual_keywords: shattered mirror, dark alter ego, skull hidden in shadow, red mood lighting
ghost mode mask, mysterious figure fading into black mist, void background, glowing eyes in dark
